title: Blue Canyon Titan Shower Kit for Bath, Stainless Steel Shower Kits & Riser Rails, High-Pressure Water Flow, Customised Bathing with 3 Mode Shower Spray, Adjustable Shower Handset, White
features: 【 HIGH-PRESSURE FLOW】: Have a high-flow refreshing shower bath with the Blue Canyon Titan shower kit & be all set for the day! A powerful shower head with anti-clog pores provides a better bath time, as a pressure-boosting shower has a massaging effect that calms a tired body.

【 PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL】: The high-quality material used in the Titan shower kit makes it sturdy & durable. The shower kit design is made such that it suits every interior bath design & looks elegant while giving the utmost relaxing & pleasuring shower experience.

【3 SPRAY MODES】: Get your shower personalised! Our Titan Showerhead comprises 3 different mode settings-Outer Rain, Jet, Aeration. Choose the mode that suits you best & enjoy your bath time to the fullest. Hurry up & customise your showering asap!

【UNIVERSAL FITTING】: The shower kit universally fits most bathroom walls. No more high plumber costs and you don’t need to buy any tools for installation, too; it installs in minutes with just one hand-tighten connection.

【EASY TO CLEAN 】: The leakproof shower head is easy to clean; you don’t need a specialised tool for cleaning & it’s lightweight too, which makes it convenient to clean, so clean it on your own. Just wipe it with a cloth or sponge. Extremely simple!
description: Blue Canyon Titan 3 Mode Shower Kit is made up of durable and high-quality material. The kit includes one hand shower and a rail. It is ideal for new homes, renovated bathrooms or freshening up a bathroom.
